title: APM: CSRF Token Missing or Invalid on State-Changing Request
description: Detects HTTP POST/PUT/DELETE requests to state-changing endpoints that lack CSRF tokens or have invalid tokens, indicating potential Cross-Site Request Forgery. Uses APM span attributes to detect missing security headers.
query: 'Log Source' = 'SOC Application Logs' and ((('HTTP Method' = 'POST' or 'HTTP Method' = 'PUT' or 'HTTP Method' = 'DELETE' or 'HTTP Method' = 'PATCH')) and (not ('Referrer' like '*')) and not (('Request URL' like '*/api/health*' or 'Request URL' like '*/api/status*' or 'Request URL' like '*/login*' or 'Request URL' like '*/oauth*' or 'Request URL' like '*/webhook*'))) | stats count as Violations by 'Request URL', 'HTTP Method', 'Client IP', 'Service Name' | sort -Violations
